title: Charlie: The Life and Art of Charles Chaplin
original_title: Charlie: The Life and Art of Charles Chaplin
overview: Brilliant, long in-the-works story of the life and art of the world's greatest comedian and the cinema's first genius, Charlie Chaplin. Produced, written and directed by renowned film critic Richard Schickel.
